scripts.test: npm run test:rules && npm run test:functions
scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --config firebase.test.json --only firestore,storage "jest --runInBand rules-tests" --project tantin-rules-test
scripts.test:functions: npm --prefix functions run build && firebase emulators:exec --config firebase.test.json --only firestore "npm --prefix functions test -- --runInBand" --project tantin-rules-test
